subcodes.title: Words to a reporter from the Montreal Star on 10 Sep 1912
subcodes.first_line: As to the question of disarmament, all nations must disarm at the same time... The one man slapped another on the face.... All Europe is an armed camp... It will be established in this century...
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @war and peace, @predictions and prophecies, @means of establishment of future civilization, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @universal peace; world unity
